headline: Assessing J. M. Smucker (SJM) Valuation As Shares Trade Near US$108.96
summary: Why J. M. Smucker Is On Investors’ Radar Today J. M. Smucker (SJM) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the share price at US$108.96. This has prompted investors to reassess how its food, beverage, and pet segments stack up against its current valuation. See our latest analysis for J. M. Smucker. Recent trading has been a bit choppy, with a 1 day share price return of 2.02% and a 7 day share price return of 4.99%. A 90 day share price return of 9.62% and a year to date gain of...

headline: J. M. Smucker Leadership Shakeup Puts Integration And Earnings Story In Focus
summary: J. M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) announced that President and COO John Brase is leaving the company under a separation agreement. The company is adding Woo-Sung (Bruce) Chung and David Singer to its Board of Directors. These leadership and board changes come as the company continues portfolio optimization and integration efforts. For you as an investor, this is a meaningful update at a company known for its packaged foods and consumer brands, including coffee, spreads, and pet food. Executive...
